kpi.sellersTeaser: starts when valuation form is live

needsAction.title: Needs Action · Ready Replies
needsAction.emptyText: AI drafts appear here as buyers reply.

panel.selectALead: Select a lead to see details.
panel.subject: Subject

network.title: Your Network
network.teaser: Opt-in cooperation with other AIVENA agencies — share buyers or listings on agreed terms, and split commission. Coming soon.

buyers.emptyConvo: You're all caught up — no replies waiting.
buyers.emptyText: AI-drafted replies appear here as buyers reply to your messages.
buyers.emptyTextCards: Each draft appears here as a quick-scan card once a buyer replies.

thread.noThread: No prior conversation yet — this will be the first contact.

reply.dismissReasonPlaceholder: Why are you dismissing this draft?

sellers.emptyTitleCards: No seller leads to show as cards yet
sellers.emptyText: Seller leads arrive automatically once your valuation form is live — when a homeowner asks what their property is worth, they appear here.
sellers.emptyTextCards: Once your valuation form is live, each seller lead appears here as a quick-scan card.

network.lookingForSubtitle: Wants a 2-bed near Orihuela Costa · under €250k
network.matchesCount: 3 LISTINGS FROM YOUR NETWORK MATCH THIS BUYER
network.privacy: Your buyer's details stay private. The other agency only sees that an agency wants to discuss their listing — never the buyer.
network.agencySplit: Splits are agreed between agencies — AIVENA takes no part in commission.

wizard.title: Set up your valuation form
wizard.subtitle: A multilingual "what's my home worth?" form for your website — it captures sellers automatically.
wizard.langLabel: Which languages should the form offer?
wizard.areasPlaceholder: e.g. Torrevieja, Orihuela Costa, La Zenia, Punta Prima
wizard.brandingNote: Using your agency logo & brand colour
wizard.embedNote: Paste this into your site, or send it to your web person.

notes.heading: Notes
notes.placeholder: Add a note about this lead…
notes.usedByAiHint: When on, the AI considers this note when drafting replies.

approvals.title: Approvals
approvals.subtitle: {n} waiting · everything else auto-handled
approvals.subtitleZero: You're all caught up · everything else auto-handled
approvals.description: AI-drafted replies awaiting human approval. Click a card to review, edit, and approve or dismiss.
approvals.empty: Nothing waiting. New AI drafts will appear here as buyers reply.
approvals.approvedBanner: Reply approved and queued for send.
approvals.subject: Subject
approvals.noEnquiry: No original enquiry text on file.
approvals.dismissReasonPlaceholder: Why are you dismissing this draft?

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: How your agency works, sends, and shows up to your clients
settings.personalDescription: Preferences for your account — these affect only you.
settings.messageLanguageHelp: Most operators leave this the same as their dashboard language.
settings.saveFailed: Couldn't save that change. Please try again — if it keeps happening, contact support.

checklist.title: Finish setting up
checklist.subtitle: Complete these to go fully live. Buyers and sellers only ever see your brand.

branding.title: Agency branding
branding.subtitle: What buyers and sellers see — AIVENA stays invisible behind it.
branding.logoHint: PNG or JPG, up to 2 MB.
branding.saveFailedBranding: Couldn't save branding. Please try again — if it keeps happening, contact support.

identity.title: Sending identity
identity.subtitle: The verified domain AIVENA sends from, under your name.
identity.domainHint: To change this, contact support — changing the sending domain requires re-verification.

aiRules.title: AI reply rules
aiRules.subtitle: When AIVENA can send on its own, and when it must wait for you.
aiRules.honestSubLine: Rules activate when your automation engine is live — currently AIVENA always drafts for your approval.
aiRules.toggleDraftHelp: AIVENA writes the reply, you approve.
aiRules.toggleWhatsappHelp: Instant re-engagement when a call is missed.
aiRules.quietSubtitle: When AIVENA can — and can't — send follow-ups.
aiRules.quietFramingNote: Controls when AIVENA sends follow-up emails. Hot/super-hot leads and replies you approve manually always send immediately.

voice.title: Voice & tone
voice.subtitle: How your agency "sounds" — this shapes every AI-written reply.
voice.honestSubLine: Shapes your follow-up emails today, and extends to inbound replies when the automation engine lands.
voice.currentToneHint: Currently: {tone} — pick one of the new options to update.
voice.describePlaceholder: Friendly and professional. We're local experts who make foreign buyers feel at home. Never pushy.

languages.title: Languages
languages.subtitle: Languages your agency replies in.
languages.saveFailedLanguages: Couldn't save languages. Please try again — if it keeps happening, contact support.
languages.translateIntoHelp: Incoming messages and AI-drafted replies are translated into this language across your whole agency, so anyone on your team can read and approve them.
languages.displayDefault: Default dashboard language for new team members
languages.displayDefaultHelp: New team members see the dashboard in this language until they pick their own in Personal settings.

channels.title: Connected channels & integrations
channels.subtitle: Where AIVENA listens and acts. Connect what you use.
channels.comingSoonNote: Coming soon — we'll email you when it's live.
channels.whatsappModalBody: Connecting WhatsApp Business requires a verified phone number and a one-time provider handshake. Enter your business phone number and we'll start the verification flow when our WhatsApp integration goes live.
channels.calendarModalBody: Google Calendar sync needs OAuth permission to read and create events. We'll walk you through the consent screen when this integration goes live.
channels.socialModalBody: Blotato lets AIVENA publish generated posts straight to your Instagram and Facebook. We'll connect your accounts when this integration goes live.
channels.submittedToast: Thanks — we'll email you when this is live.

team.title: Team & access
team.subtitle: Who can log in, and what they can do.
team.footerSubLine: Invite teammates by email — they'll get a magic-link to sign in. Invite emails go out once our team flow ships, a few days from now.
team.invitedToast: Invite created — email will be sent when our invite system goes live (a few days).

errors.contextError: Something went wrong creating that invite. Please refresh and try again.
errors.insufficientRole: Only the agency owner can send invites.
errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.invalidInvitationRole: Please choose Agent or Viewer for the role.
errors.generic: Couldn't create that invite — please try again.

plan.title: Plan & usage
plan.subtitle: Your subscription tier and this month’s usage.
plan.provisioningNote: Your plan is set when your account is provisioned. To change tiers, contact your AIVENA representative.

properties.title: Properties
properties.subtitle: Import your active listings from a CSV so AIVENA can mention them accurately.
properties.dropPrompt: Upload a CSV of your listings
properties.dropHint: We map common Spanish CRM column names automatically.
properties.unmatchedHint: These columns weren’t recognised and will be ignored. Everything else imports fine.
properties.doneNote: Property search readiness finishes processing shortly in the background.

performance.subtitle: How AIVENA is working for you — reply speed, reach, and the multilingual edge
performance.leadsOverTimeTake: Every lead answered — day or night, weekday or weekend.
performance.responseTrendTake: Reply speed, week over week — the trend sharpens as history builds.
performance.weeksHaveData: {n} of {total} weeks have data — building history
performance.languagesTake: Every lead answered in their own language — the thing local agents can't match.
performance.noLanguagesYet: No leads yet — languages will appear here.
performance.missedCallTake: Every missed call triggers an instant WhatsApp in the caller's language.
performance.missedCallEmpty: Activates when Voice goes live. Once connected, you'll see missed calls, recovered calls, and your recovery rate here — live.

content.subtitle: AI-generated posts & ad creative — drafted in your voice, ready when you are
content.generateBody: Describe a listing or pick one from your CRM and AIVENA drafts the caption, the ad copy and the creative — in your agency's voice, your colours, your buyer languages. You review and post it yourself; AIVENA never touches your ad budget.
content.explainer: Content is the output of AIVENA's Generate pillar — AI-written social posts and ad creative the agency posts itself. This page is a clearly-watermarked preview of what's coming; nothing here is live or published yet.

instagram.title: Beachfront villa · Torrevieja
instagram.body: Stunning 3-bed villa steps from the sea 🌊 Private terrace, sea views, walkable to everything. Book a viewing today…

facebook.title: New listing · Orihuela Costa
facebook.body: Just listed! Modern 2-bed apartment with sea views in Orihuela Costa. Community pool, parking, move-in ready…

metaAd.title: Valuation ad · lead magnet
metaAd.body: What's your Costa Blanca home worth? Free instant valuation, no obligation. Trusted by foreign owners across the coast…

errors.pageLoad: Something went wrong loading this — please refresh, and contact support if it keeps happening.
errors.approveFailed: Something went wrong sending this reply. Please try again — if it keeps happening, contact support.
errors.dismissFailed: Something went wrong dismissing this task. Please try again — if it keeps happening, contact support.

login.title: Sign in to AIVENA
login.subtitle: We'll email you a sign-in link — no password needed.
login.sentBody: We sent a sign-in link to {email}. Click it from the same device to sign in. The link is valid for one hour.
login.errorGeneric: Couldn't send a sign-in link. Please try again — if it keeps happening, contact support.

callback.errorTitle: We couldn't finish signing you in
callback.errorBody: The sign-in link may have expired or already been used. Please request a new one.

invite.title: You've been invited to AIVENA
invite.tokenMissing: This invitation link doesn't include a token. Please check the email you received and use the original link.
invite.errorBody: The link may have expired or been revoked. Please ask the person who invited you to resend it.
invite.signInRequired: Sign in to accept this invitation
invite.signInRequiredBody: We need to verify it's you before adding you to the team.
invite.acceptTitle: You've been invited to join an agency
invite.acceptBody: Click below to accept and join the team.
invite.invalidLink: This invitation link is no longer valid
invite.invalidLinkBody: Please ask the person who invited you to resend the invite.
invite.alreadyUsed: This invitation has already been used
invite.alreadyUsedBody: Sign in normally to access the dashboard.
invite.expiredBody: Invitations are valid for 7 days. Please ask for a new one.
invite.emailMismatch: Please sign in with the email this invite was sent to
invite.emailMismatchBody: The signed-in account doesn't match the invitation. Sign out and use the right email.
invite.authMissingEmailBody: Your account doesn't expose an email address, so we can't match the invitation. Please contact support.

properties.title: Properties
properties.subtitle: Your active listing catalog.
properties.emptyBody: Import your listings from a CSV to get started.

gate.launchNote: This activates when your account goes live.
gate.tierNote: Available on the Unlimited plan at launch.

studio.propertyEmpty: No properties yet — import your catalog in Settings → Properties first.

ad.title: Ad creative
ad.subtitle: Branded paid-ad images for Meta, with copy in your buyer’s language. You run the ads yourself — AIVENA never touches your budget.

social.title: Social post
social.subtitle: Organic posts for Instagram and Facebook — from a property, or from a free prompt.
social.freePromptLabel: What should the post be about?
social.freePromptPlaceholder: e.g. why summer is a great time to view properties on the Costa Blanca
social.captionPreview: Your caption and hashtags appear here once generated.

renovation.title: Virtual staging
renovation.subtitle: Re-render a real room photo in a new style. A visualization to help buyers picture the space.
renovation.uploadHint: JPG or PNG of a room from one of your listings.
renovation.attestation: I confirm this property is in our listings catalog and we have rights to modify the image.
renovation.attestationRequired: Tick the rights confirmation above to enable generation.
renovation.disclaimer: Visualization only — not a guaranteed real-world result.

library.emptyBody: Your generated content will appear here once you create ad creatives, social posts, or staged images.

assistant.title: AIVENA Assistant
assistant.subtitle: Product help & Spanish RE compliance
assistant.aiDisclosure: You’re chatting with AIVENA’s AI assistant. It can make mistakes — double-check anything important.
assistant.greeting: Hi! I can help you use AIVENA and answer questions about Spanish real-estate compliance and best practice.
assistant.capabilities: Ask me how a feature works, what a setting does, or for general real-estate advice. I don’t read your individual leads.

matches.subtitle: When you add a property, AIVENA matches it against the buyers already in your contacts and surfaces them here — you decide who to reach out to.
matches.emptyBody: Matches appear here when a new property matches a buyer in your contacts. Nothing is sent automatically.
matches.how1: You import or add a property to your catalog.
matches.how2: AIVENA checks it against your existing buyer contacts within your match tolerances.
matches.how3: Any matches show up here for you to action manually.

valuation.title: What’s your property worth?
valuation.subtitle: An instant estimate from {agency}
valuation.consentData: I agree to my data being processed to produce this valuation.
valuation.consentComms: I’d like to receive related updates and offers.
valuation.consentNeeded: Please agree to data processing to continue.
valuation.ecoDisclaimer: This is an automated estimate, not an ECO/805/2003 homologated tasación. The figure is provided as a guide only.

viewing.title: Confirm viewing time
viewing.subtitle: Pick one of the times the buyer suggested, or set your own. AIVENA will confirm it to the buyer and add it to your calendar.

network.title: Network
network.body: Opt-in cooperation with other AIVENA agencies — share buyers or listings on agreed terms.

viewings.subtitle: Confirmed viewing appointments. New bookings sync to your calendar and appear here.
